overall.description: First-person driving gameplay through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077 during a rainy night. The player navigates a futuristic sports car through neon-lit downtown streets, transitioning from elevated highways to dense commercial districts with heavy holographic advertising and wet reflective roads.

events.description: exiting covered tunnel section into open elevated highway
decelerating as vehicle approaches first major intersection

agents.ego_description: accelerating along elevated highway, passing under concrete overpasses and through light rain

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning the road ahead with support pillars
thick concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway structure
tall modern glass building with illuminated windows visible in the distance
large illuminated advertising screen on the side of the road

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an elevated highway during a rainy night, driving under concrete overpasses with limited sky visibility. The vehicle accelerates along the wet asphalt, passing support pillars and approaching an intersection with distant glass towers and digital billboards becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with heavy digital signage

events.description: entering open commercial district from elevated highway with dense neon signage
stopping behind white sedan waiting at red traffic light
executing left turn at intersection onto new street

agents.ego_description: navigating through busy commercial intersection, stopping for traffic signal, then turning left onto main commercial strip

notable_agents.action: white sedan stopped at red light directly ahead of ego vehicle
blue sports car passing through the intersection from the left

entered.detail: low-rise commercial buildings with bright neon storefront lighting
tall traffic signal infrastructure with illuminated lights
zebra crossing stripes painted on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a wide-open commercial intersection with dense neon signage and wet reflective streets. After stopping behind a white sedan at a red light, the driver executes a left turn onto a main commercial thoroughfare, passing pedestrians and other vehicles in the bustling district.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial strip with holographic advertisements

events.description: passing prominent ROUKA neon sign on right side of street
overtaking slower silver sports car on the right side

agents.ego_description: accelerating to high speed through neon-lit commercial district, performing lane changes and overtaking slower traffic

notable_agents.action: silver sports car being overtaken on the right side of the road

entered.detail: large prominent neon sign with blue lettering reading ROUKA on building facade
tall structure projecting large holographic advertisements into the street
continuous yellow metal barriers separating lanes on the right side
tall skyscraper with fully illuminated glass facade and internal lighting

segments.scene_description: Driving at high speed through the dense commercial heart of the district, the vehicle passes the prominent ROUKA neon sign and holographic advertisement towers. The wet streets reflect the intense pink and cyan neon lighting as the car overtakes a silver sports car, with yellow traffic barriers guiding the lane path.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional commercial street with parking structures

events.description: executing sharp left turn at intersection into narrower street
entering narrower street with reduced neon lighting and more parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: slowing down for left turn maneuver, then proceeding through narrower commercial street with parked cars

entered.detail: multi-level parking facility with open concrete levels and parked cars visible
building facade illuminated with prominent red neon lighting
public seating along the sidewalk near the curb

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows and executes a left turn into a narrower transitional street. The dense neon of the main commercial strip gives way to mixed lighting with a prominent red-lit building on the right and a parking garage on the left. Yellow traffic barriers now line the left side as the street becomes more enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban street under overpass with pedestrian walkways

events.description: entering covered street section under concrete overpass with reduced lighting
concrete support pillar temporarily blocks view of the road ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through covered street section, passing pedestrians on the right sidewalk and approaching destination

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking along the sidewalk parallel to the vehicle

entered.detail: solid concrete overhead structure covering the street creating a tunnel-like effect
elevated sidewalk with pedestrians walking alongside the road
wall covered in colorful graffiti art visible on the left side

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes the vehicle through a covered street under a concrete overpass, significantly reducing ambient light. The road becomes more enclosed with graffiti-covered walls on the left and a pedestrian walkway on the right where a person in a white jacket walks parallel to the car. The vehicle slows as it navigates the dimly lit underpass section.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rainy metropolis, transitioning from an open elevated highway into a neon-drenched commercial core before descending into a dim, enclosed underpass. It begins by accelerating under concrete overpasses on a wet highway, where the view gradually opens as the vehicle approaches an intersection of distant glass towers and digital billboards. As the car enters a wide commercial intersection, the environment shifts into a vibrant district of reflective streets and dense neon signage, eventually speeding past towering holographic advertisements and pink and cyan lights. The scene then turns away from the main thoroughfare into a narrower transitional street, where the intense glow fades into mixed lighting and red-lit buildings. Finally, the camera moves into a covered section under a concrete overpass, where the bright city lights are replaced by graffiti-covered walls and a dimly lit pedestrian walkway.
